Features Syntax Examples
Open app Start drawing

v3 . text-first diagrams

Diagrams at the speed of thought, not dragging.

Chart Mage turns a few lines of plain text into a polished sequence diagram or flowchart. Keep your hands on the keyboard and let layout, arrows, and structure settle into place.

Start drawing Explore features

  • 0drag handles in the canvas
  • PNGexport ready
checkout-flow.cm

participant User

participant API

participant Stripe

User->>API: checkout

API->>Stripe: charge $19.00

Stripe-->>API: ok

API-->>User: 200

note receipt mailed

Desktop recommended

Read on phone, write on desktop.

The editor needs more space than a small screen can give. Keep exploring here, then open Chart Mage on your laptop to start drawing.

Open the app

Why it feels fast

Three cards, one promise.

Less flicker, more certainty. The product stays quiet while the syntax and canvas do the work.

No layout fiddling

Type the relationships, not the geometry. Chart Mage resolves spacing, arrows, and hierarchy for you.

Smart autocomplete

Participants, arrows, notes, loops, and fragments stay close at hand, so the editor keeps up with your typing cadence.

Syntax you can read aloud

User ->> API: checkout says exactly what it does. You can learn it in ten seconds and keep it in muscle memory.

Built for crisp handoff

A clean canvas, not a clean slate.

Charts stay local, export as PNG, and remain easy to version because the source is still just text. Draft quickly, share cleanly.

Open the editor
12k charts drafted this month
96% stay in keyboard flow
10s average learn time
0 drag handles in the canvas

Ready when you are

From first line to exported diagram in minutes.

Start drawing Send feedback
